  1. org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.sampling

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.sampling

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.sampling
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.sampling
Method callbacks for MCP sampling (create message) requests.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.provider.sampling
MCP providers that expose sampling (create message) handlers to the transport layer.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.spring
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.sampling used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.sampling
    Class
    Description
    AbstractMcpSamplingMethodCallback
    Abstract base class for creating callbacks around sampling methods.
    AbstractMcpSamplingMethodCallback.AbstractBuilder
    Abstract builder for creating McpSamplingMethodCallback instances.
    AsyncMcpSamplingMethodCallback
    Class for creating Function callbacks around sampling methods that return Mono.
    AsyncMcpSamplingMethodCallback.Builder
    Builder for creating AsyncMcpSamplingMethodCallback instances.
    SyncMcpSamplingMethodCallback
    Class for creating Function callbacks around sampling methods.
    SyncMcpSamplingMethodCallback.Builder
    Builder for creating SyncMcpSamplingMethodCallback instances.
